case_title: ANEESH RANGNEKAR VS. LAURA SUE KARSTETTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-13-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANEESH RANGNEKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURA SUE KARSTETTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRANT KARSTETTER, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT BRANT KARSTETTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURA SUE KARSTETTER STATES (THROUGH HUSBAND) THAT SERVICE IS NOT GOOD. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS SERVICE IS ADEQUATE AND PREPARED TO HEAR THE MATTER. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. DEFENDANTS WERE NOT PREPARED TO GO FORWARD WITH TRIAL TODAY. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RANGNEKAR, ANEESH AS TO DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, LAURA SUE KARSTETTER, BRANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-08-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANEESH RANGNEKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANT KARSTETTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURA SUE KARSTETTER IS NOT PRESENT BUT REPRESENTED BY HER HUSBAND BRANT KARSTETTER. SERVICE WAS FOUND TO BE DEFECTIVE ON DEFENDANT LAURA SUE KARSTETTER WHO REQUIRES PROPER SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON BRANT KARSTETTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $70.00 - SERVED OCT-21-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, LAURA SUE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/11//19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) APPEARING FOR WIFE LAURA SUE KERSTETTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, BRANT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ANEESH RANGNEKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURA SUE KARSTETTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANT KARSTETTER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED AUG-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, BRANT
DECLARATION OF CORRECT ADDRESS FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, LAURA SUE KARSTETTER, BRANT
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANGNEKAR, ANEESH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, LAURA SUE KARSTETTER, BRANT $4,177.25 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,377.25, DEFENDANTS LAURA & BRANT KARSTETTER SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. COURT FINDS THAT PURSUANT TO PARAGRAPH 2.2(C) OF THE ASSET PURCHASE AGREEMENT DATED JUNE 13, 2015 DEFENDANTS WERE OBLIGATED TO PAY ACCOUNTS PAYABLE OF THERAPEIA INC. AND THAT THE PAYMENT OF $4177.25 BY PLAINTIFF ON 10/21/2015 WAS A PAYMENT TO SUCH AN ACCOUNT PAYABLE. COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT OTHER AMOUNTS WERE OWED. DEFENDANTS TESTIFIED THAT THEIR CORPORATION THERAPEIA WAS NOT IN GOOD STANDING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$70.00) SERVED AUG-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, LAURA SUE
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REPRESENTED BY HUSBAND BRANT KARSTETTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT KARSTETTER, LAURA SUE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
